whats_new.title: Oracle GoldenGate supports direct connectivity (DSN-less) for SQL Server database connections
whats_new.description: Oracle GoldenGate adds direct connectivity support for SQL Server connections, allowing server host/IP and instance port entries for database connections.

behavior_changes.title: Behavior change in Oracle GoldenGate
behavior_changes.description: Oracle GoldenGate introduces the following feature, which impacts the behavior of configuring and using Oracle GoldenGate:

behavior_changes.title: Microsoft ODBC Driver 18 for SQL Server
behavior_changes.description: Oracle GoldenGate for SQL Server now packages the Microsoft ODBC Driver 18 along with the Oracle GoldenGate for SQL Server installation, and database connections will use this driver by default.

deprecated.title: Oracle GoldenGate has deprecated DBOPTIONS USEREPLICATIONUSER
deprecated.description: DBOPTIONS USEREPLICATIONUSER option has been deprecated. All SQL Server builds automatically set the connection with Replication=yes , and the functionality of DBOPTIONS USEREPLICATIONUSER remains the same as long as SQL Server ODBC driver is version 17.8.1 or higher.
